rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: nange sigreet seedoodu ista. sigreet seedoodralli een tappu ?
rows.english: I like smoking cigarettes. What is wrong in smoking cigarettes ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: seedoodrinda een laabha ? seedoodakke ninge yaar heeldru ?
rows.english: What is the benefit of smoking ? Who asked you to smoke ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: But it is harmful to health. Quit smoking.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Then I won't smoke. I will certainly give it up.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Take care of your health. Stop smooking.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I won't smoke cigarette any more.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Raju, please don't make any noise.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Dad, the noise is from the neighbouring house.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: But who is it that is meddling with the door ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: raamuunee, avnu nanna bariyoo dakkee bidalla.
rows.english: It's Ramu ! He does not let me write.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Now, who is it that is racing there ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: He runs off after spoiling my writing.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Don't you have any reading to do ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: oodoodakkuu bidallanna. maataadidre alood ond gottu avange.
rows.english: He does not let me read. He knows only crying for everything.
